# Crawl Space Greenville

> Greenville Crawl Space Pros connects homeowners with trusted local crawl space encapsulation, vapor barrier, repair, and moisture control specialists in Greenville, SC and Upstate South Carolina.

## Contact

- Phone: (864) 387-3270
- Email: info@crawlspacegreenville.com
- Website: https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com

## Services

- Crawl Space Encapsulation: https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/crawl-space-encapsulation
- Vapor Barrier Installation: https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/vapor-barrier
- Crawl Space Repair: https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/crawl-space-repair
- Dehumidifier Installation: https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/dehumidifier-installation
- Mold in Crawl Space: https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/mold-in-crawl-space
- Floor Joist Repair: https://www.crawlspacegreenville.com/floor-joist-repair

## Service Area

Greenville, Spartanburg, Anderson, Mauldin, Simpsonville, Greer, Taylors, Easley, Duncan, Fountain Inn — Upstate South Carolina.
